items.question: Which one is correct about both the Universal Declaration of Human Rights (UDHR) and the European Convention on Human Rights (ECHR)?
choices: They both recognise a need for a balance between the rights of individuals and the interference with these rights
They both protect the right of freedom of expression and prioritise it over the right to privacy
They both recognise privacy as an absolute individual right
UDHR is more focused on the rights of individuals while ECHR is more focused on the balance among these rights

items.question: Which one primarily deals with the automatic processing of personal data?
What was the reason for an additional protocol to Convention 108?
choices: To address the fact that Convention 108 was meant for data transfers among European countries
To address the necessity of transborder data transfers
To address the fact that Convention 108 did not provide any measures for the transfer of personal data to non-signatory countries
To address challenges resulting from the use of new information and communication technologies
